# Rank within each group using windowcomp row_number() by + sort, alias LAST

**Dataset**: `guardian_xql_lab` (composite/array lookup lab)

For a per-group ranking, `windowcomp` takes `by <partition>` then `sort <dir> <field>`, and CRUCIALLY the `as <alias>` comes LAST — after `by` and `sort`. Writing `as` right after the function (`windowcomp row_number() as r by dept`) 400s with `bad query syntax at 'by'`. The correct order is `windowcomp row_number() by dept sort desc o as rnk_in_dept` — equivalent to SQL `ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dept ORDER BY o DESC)`.

```sql
dataset = guardian_xql_lab
| comp sum(bytes_out) as o by dept, username
| windowcomp row_number() by dept sort desc o as rnk_in_dept
| sort asc dept, asc rnk_in_dept
| fields dept, username, o, rnk_in_dept
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant; measured cost ~0.0003 CU against a 10-row lookup (data scanned, not query complexity, drives CU)._
